disclaimer: Conservative engineering policy, not legal advice or a warranty of rights. Unknown or ambiguous rights are denied by default.

scope.intended_release: Publicly redistributable query-positive-negative training rows with source-level attribution and revisions
scope.separate_performance_track: This policy does not block a separately labeled non-commercial performance-research track. Data, weights, manifests, and model cards from that track must remain segregated and must not claim rights-safe/public-release status.

status_enum.go: Eligible after automated per-item gates; no unresolved source-level review.
status_enum.conditional_go: Potentially eligible, but every listed review must be resolved before release.
status_enum.hold: Do not ingest into a release build until source-level review is resolved.
status_enum.no_go: Do not use in the redistributable v1 build.
status_enum.no_go_training: May be readable for evaluation, but must never enter training, mining, prompts, or validation.

optional_v1_1_not_counted.replacement_rule: Replace lower-quality duplicate-heavy rows only after written rights and redistribution clearance.

sources.name: KOGL Type 0 public text works
include: Korean textual works whose item and attachment are explicitly marked KOGL Type 0
HTML or text-bearing PDF after third-party elements are removed
exclude: Type 1 through 4 when not separately authorized for this source adapter
AI-Type-only works
missing or board-level-only markings whose attachment scope is ambiguous
photos, figures, trademarks, fonts, software, comments, personal data, or third-party excerpts
sources.revision_rule: Store item URL, attachment URL, item modified timestamp, retrieved_at, raw SHA-256, parsed-text SHA-256, and a hash of the item-level license evidence page.
sources.go_no_go_rule: GO per item only when Type 0 applies to the exact text payload and all rights/privacy flags are false; otherwise HOLD or NO_GO.

sources.name: KOGL Type 1 public text works
include: Korean textual works whose item and attachment are explicitly marked KOGL Type 1
Government reports, guidance, notices, and educational text after section-level rights filtering
exclude: Types 2, 3, and 4
AI-Type-only works because training-data resale is restricted
attachments not covered by the visible Type 1 marker
third-party charts, photos, long quotations, trademarks, personal data, and externally authored appendices
sources.revision_rule: Persist exact attribution text, item and attachment URLs, source modified time, retrieval time, raw and parsed SHA-256, and license-evidence hash.
sources.go_no_go_rule: GO per item only with exact Type 1 scope and machine-verified attribution coverage; any missing attribution or third-party ambiguity is HOLD.

sources.name: Korean statutes, treaties, and administrative-rule primary text

rights_basis.primary_text: Korean Copyright Act Article 7 exclusions for specified official legal texts
rights_basis.delivery_layer: The official LAW OPEN DATA page states broad reuse including commercial use but requires application and approval
rights_basis.database_caveat: Do not infer that Article 7 eliminates selection, arrangement, database, API, or editorial rights

include: Officially returned current and historical statute text
Treaty and administrative-rule primary text when the approved API and Article 7 basis are documented
Article, paragraph, item, effective-date, promulgation, and ministry metadata returned by the approved API
exclude: Easy-law editorial explanations and authored summaries
Foreign-law or privately authored translations
University, corporation, or public-institution internal rules without a separate license basis
Court decisions in v1 because privacy and third-party quotation review is unresolved
Images, form scans, and annex files whose rights or accessibility are not verified
sources.revision_rule: Store MST/ID, promulgation and effective dates, API target, response retrieval time, response SHA-256, normalized article SHA-256, and API approval record ID without the credential.
sources.go_no_go_rule: GO only under an active official API approval matching public dataset release, and only for primary legal text; editorial or privacy-ambiguous layers are NO_GO.

sources.name: Korean Wikipedia dated article dump
include: Current main-namespace prose from a dated pages-articles dump after benchmark decontamination
exclude: Images and media
quoted or imported text with incompatible notices
tables when cell-level provenance cannot be retained
MIRACL, KorQuAD, SQuADKor, or other benchmark exact and near-duplicate passages
sources.revision_rule: Resolve latest to an immutable YYYYMMDD directory, verify the official checksum, compute SHA-256, and store page/revision IDs. Never use the word latest as a revision.
sources.go_no_go_rule: GO only as a separately licensed and attributed share-alike shard after packaging and benchmark-overlap review.

sources.name: PMC Open Access articles with per-article CC0 or CC BY
include: JATS abstract and prose body for whitelisted articles
Korean grounded queries over English evidence for cross-lingual replay
exclude: All non-whitelisted or absent licenses
Author Manuscript records without an explicit accepted license
Retracted records
Figures, tables, captions, supplementary files, and third-party credited material
Expired emergency reuse records
Individual diagnosis or treatment query generation
sources.revision_rule: Store OA API license and updated fields, the article's own license statement, PMCID/DOI, package URL, package SHA-256, and retrieval time; recheck status immediately before release.
sources.go_no_go_rule: GO per article only if its current explicit machine-readable license is whitelisted, retracted=false, and all extracted sections are free of separate third-party credits.

sources.name: Direct U.S. federal employee works exposed through CDC Content Services

rights_basis.us_rule: 17 U.S.C. 105 for qualifying works prepared by U.S. Government officers or employees as part of official duties
cdc_conditions: state that original material is available free on the agency site

include: Text items whose metadata and page establish direct CDC federal authorship and no third-party copyright notice
exclude: Contractor, grantee, partner, state, local, or externally sourced content
Images, logos, trademarks, quotations, and linked third-party text
Any item with missing source, authorship, attribution, or copyright status
sources.revision_rule: Store media ID, source and owning organization, source URL, publication and modification dates, API response SHA-256, content SHA-256, retrieved_at, and policy revision hash.
sources.go_no_go_rule: HOLD until written global redistribution and transformation review is complete. If unresolved, use the specified KOGL/law fallback and release zero CDC rows.

sources.name: OpenDART narrowly selected structured disclosure facts
include_after_clearance_only: Explicitly approved company codes, dates, filing identifiers, and isolated numeric fields
exclude: Narrative filing text
Full tables, notes, auditor reports, attachments, and copyrighted submitter expression
Any field set whose systematic extraction or redistribution scope is not cleared
sources.revision_rule: If later approved, store receipt number, API field set, response date, response SHA-256, exact clearance record ID, and no credential.
sources.go_no_go_rule: NO_GO for v1. Written rights and redistribution clearance is mandatory before changing status or planned_rows.

excluded_sources.reason: Non-commercial and/or no-derivatives conditions conflict with the v1 public commercial adaptable dataset goal.
The AI type allows model training under conditions but prohibits resale of AI training data made from the work; it is not sufficient for this redistributable training-data product.

AIHub describes non-commercial research/development use and requires separate discussion for dataset sales; per-dataset rightsholders and redistribution terms vary. Download or training access is not public redistribution permission.
excluded_sources.exception_rule: A specific dataset may be reconsidered only with explicit written downstream redistribution and commercial-use permission from all relevant rightsholders.

excluded_sources.reason: CC-BY-SA-4.0 availability does not cure official MTEB Korean benchmark contamination.
Official benchmark exposure plus the published CC BY-ND 2.0 KR condition; do not use in training, mining, prompts, or validation.
Queries/qrels/corpus are direct official MTEB targets. Repository labels do not replace underlying Wikipedia corpus obligations.
Aggregates with absent dataset license or heterogeneous upstream rights are default-deny for public redistribution, even if useful in a segregated smoke or non-commercial track.

suites.rule: Freeze and hash every internal or future external evaluation set before the first training source ingest; append its manifest hash without exposing private test content.

stages.outputs: Read-only blocklist manifest with source IDs, normalized hashes, MinHash signatures, and a signed manifest SHA-256

teacher_requirements: Model and service terms permit redistribution of generated dataset outputs
Exact model revision, decoding config, and prompt SHA-256 are recorded
No benchmark examples appear in prompts
No unsupported facts may be added

negative_sources: BM25 within an approved compatible shard
current embedding model within an approved compatible shard

pipeline.multi_hop_license_rule: Combine evidence only inside the same output shard or an explicitly reviewed compatible-license pair; inherit all attribution and share-alike duties.
pipeline.teacher_independence_rule: The verifier must be a different model/revision or independently trained checkpoint from the generator; self-approval alone is invalid.

required: All source-level conditional reviews are resolved in writing
Every row has an allowed exact license and item-level evidence
Every row has immutable source revision and content hash
No secret, API credential, personal identifier, unresolved third-party right, or retracted source is present
Zero exact, source-ID, URL, or MinHash benchmark collision
Human audit thresholds pass globally and per source
Shard and combined-package license compatibility is reviewed
Independent pre-release legal review is complete
Dataset card states limitations and does not provide legal certainty
release_gate.on_failure: Do not publish the affected row, shard, dataset, adapter, or model as rights-safe. Quarantine or route only to the separately governed non-commercial research track.
